//// Static manifest of metrics this relay emits. Generated from the relay
//// declaration — do not edit by hand. The runner imports this to get its
//// scorer allowlist; downstream language tooling will import it to
//// type-check measurement references.

import gleam/option.{type Option}

pub type ScorerInfo {
  ScorerInfo(
    name: String,
    data_type: String,
    count_metric: String,
    value_metric: Option(String),
  )
}

pub const metric_prefix: String = "langfuse.scores"

pub const relay_name: String = "langfuse_to_datadog"

pub fn scorers() -> List(ScorerInfo) {
  [
    ScorerInfo(
      name: "helpfulness",
      data_type: "numeric",
      count_metric: "langfuse.scores.count",
      value_metric: option.Some("langfuse.scores.value"),
    ),
    ScorerInfo(
      name: "safe",
      data_type: "boolean",
      count_metric: "langfuse.scores.count",
      value_metric: option.Some("langfuse.scores.value"),
    ),
  ]
}
